description_long: This snowman is constructed from three stacked, roughly spherical snowballs of decreasing size from bottom to top, forming a classic snowman shape. Its surface is textured to resemble compacted snow, with a matte white appearance. The face features a single black coal eye and a prominent orange carrot nose, but lacks a visible mouth. Two stick-like arms protrude from the middle segment, angled outward and made to look like wooden twigs. The snowman does not wear any headwear or scarf, and there are no buttons or other accessories on its body. The overall look is simple and playful, suitable for placement in parks, sidewalks, or urban winter scenes.
description: A simple, three-segment snowman with a carrot nose, one coal eye, and stick arms, featuring a classic snowy texture and no additional accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carrot nose, one coal eye, and both stick arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding carrot nose and the left stick arm, with the coal eye visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the snowman with both stick arms visible but no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the carrot nose and right stick arm, with no facial features visible.
attribute_limb_representation: stick arms extending outward from the middle segment
